full_text:
Ma Xiu 馬脩
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Xiu (馬脩). Son of Ma Zhong (Dexin). His family continued service in Jin after Shu’s surrender. Ma Xiu was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
